sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9491" key="a)ntapopai/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνταπο-παίζω</orth>, <sense id="n9491.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lose what one has won at play,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀστραγάλους</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0523.tlg001:1D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Menecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1D.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
